GPU_disclosure.boundary: The exact Rotterdam building, rack, network topology, utilization, power draw and NorthC service economics are undisclosed. Compatibility claims are not installed fleet counts.

capacity_checksum_boundary: The 82.88 MW checksum de-duplicates shared Zestienhoven capacity and sums Groningen's disclosed 1.2/1.5 MW split. It is marketed installed electrical capacity, not IT load, live load, utilization or the more-than-140-MW secured gross-grid scope.
comparison_boundary: Do not sum label, page, shared-campus, building, current, upgrade, development, gross-grid, apparent-power, installed-electrical, IT-load, GPU-readiness or customer-owned hardware measures.

ownership_and_financial_boundary.APG_regulatory_clearance: European Commission joint-control clearance in June 2026; exact stake closing not confirmed in reviewed sources
ownership_and_financial_boundary.historical_financing_boundary: The 2021 and 2023 financings cannot be added into current debt; the 2023 amount included cleaning down a EUR75m capex facility and EUR50m of near-term prefunding.

registry: NorthC official Northwest European facility-label and OSM crosswalk
